terms.label: auth_ legacy login
terms.definition: Get a legacy authentication cookie

terms.label: remote recorder a p i_ register remote recorder
terms.definition: Register a new remote recorder

terms.label: remote recorder a p i_ connect
terms.definition: Connect as the provided remote recorder

terms.label: remote recorder a p i_ disconnect
terms.definition: Disconnect as the provided remote recorder, identified via the GUID public id

terms.label: remote recorder a p i_ heartbeat
terms.definition: Heartbeat and preview as the provided remote recorder

terms.label: remote recorder a p i_ get schedule
terms.definition: Retrieve a schedule for the next 7 days for the provided remote recorder.As a best practice a new scheduled should be fetched every day even if the schedule version in the heartbeat hasn't changed

terms.label: remote recorder a p i_ update schedule
terms.definition: Update or add a set of scheduled recordings for the provided remote recorder. To add a scheduled recording, the recording should have all relevant fields filled in but an empty (all zeros) guid

terms.label: remote recorder a p i_ error
terms.definition: Register an error with the provided remote recorder on the server

terms.label: remote recorder a p i_ legacy login
terms.definition: Retrieve a legacy ASPXAUTH cookie

terms.label: remote recorder a p i_ pause recording
terms.definition: Pause the recording of the specified session on the server

terms.label: remote recorder a p i_ resume recording
terms.definition: Resume the recording of the specified session on the server

terms.label: remote recorder a p i_ report remote recorder u r ls
terms.definition: Provides a list of URLs and URL types to present to administrators to help them manage this remote recorder.Calling this replaces all previously reported URLs. URLs are preserved until replaced, so this only needs to be called when they have changed

terms.label: remote recorder a p i_ web rtc connect
terms.definition: Establishes a new connection which enables the WebRTC-based media preview feature.  After this, the client should commence WebRTC session negotiation by sending us an SDP offer.

terms.label: remote recorder a p i_ web rtc disconnect
terms.definition: Destroys the connection which enables the WebRTC-based media preview feature.

terms.label: remote recorder a p i_ web rtc get events
terms.definition: After the client has sent us an SDP offer, they should poll this  endpoint periodically to receive messages.

terms.label: remote recorder a p i_ web rtc ice candidates
terms.definition: Sends a batch of ICE candidates from client to signaling server.

terms.label: remote recorder a p i_ web rtc sdp offer
terms.definition: The client begins WebRTC session negotiation by submitting an SDP offer.
